overview: Eluru College of Engineering and Technology (ECET), established in 2008, is a private, self-financed institution located in Eluru, Andhra Pradesh. Managed by the Padmavati Educational Society, the college aims to provide high-quality technical education to rural and semi-urban students. It is situated on a 13-acre lush green campus and is recognized for its disciplined academic environment and focus on professional skill development.
accreditation: Approved by AICTE, New Delhi. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, ECE, EEE, Mechanical, Data Science)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics + AP EAPCET rank
Diploma in Engineering with valid AP ECET rank
Graduation in any stream + AP ICET rank
B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch + GATE / AP PGECET score

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through state-level web counseling (APSCHE). 70% of seats (Category A) are filled via entrance ranks. The remaining 30% (Category B) are Management Quota seats filled based on merit. Counseling Code: ELRU.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12–15 & 18, 2026; AP ICET 2026: May 2026; B.Tech Counseling: July 2026.

facilities: Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls
Transportation (Fleet covering Eluru and nearby regions)
campus.specialNote: The college emphasizes 'Campus Recruitment Training' (CRT) starting from the third year, involving soft skills, aptitude, and technical coding sessions to prepare students for top-tier IT companies.

contact.address: Chuttigunta, Apparaopalem, Duggirala, Eluru District, Andhra Pradesh - 534002
